behaviorVerification.reason: Selected javaspec passed 1/1, full domain javaspec passed 34/34, and Maven domain tests exited 0 with surefire aggregate 34 tests and no failures/errors/skips.

codeQualityStatus.reason: Small bounded patch and git diff --check evidence recorded; semantic SFT-quality review not performed.

evaluationEligibility.reason: Not approved as an evaluation case.

knownIssues: Reconstructed, not raw event stream.
Implementation-agent prompt version and exact tool-registry version were not supplied.
No commit was created.

replayability.reason: Episode is reconstructed from handoff and report artifacts; independent replay from the base commit was not performed by dataset-writer.

sftEligibility.reason: Reconstructed capture with missing implementation-agent prompt/tool-registry provenance; independent curation required.

behaviorVerification.reason: No RED/GREEN cycle or candidate behavior verification was started for occurredAt.

evaluationEligibility.reason: Tooling incident/checkpoint, not an approved evaluation case.

knownIssues: Harness does not expose a direct raw event-stream capture artifact/API to the delegated session.
No numbered behavior episode was created by design.

replayability.reason: No raw implementation event stream was available to replay; the stopped slice made no behavior changes.

sftEligibility.reason: Typed stop lacks RAW_EVENT_STREAM, prompt/tool registry fingerprint artifact, chronological tool stream, patch stream, command exit-code log, RED/GREEN artifacts, and harness-generated final git state.

behaviorVerification.reason: The selected RED example was BROKEN by incoherent javaspec generation; GREEN was not attempted and occurredAt behavior is not implemented.

codeQualityStatus.reason: The generated production stub was reverted; only one bounded RED specification change remains.

evaluationEligibility.reason: Not independently approved as an evaluation case.

knownIssues: Javaspec 2f2d074 generated an Object accessor and incoherent constructor argument order.
No GREEN or verified behavior success exists.
No numbered episode 0035 was created by design.

replayability.reason: Sealed trace integrity and chronology were verified; independent execution replay was not performed.

sftEligibility.reason: FRAMEWORK_INCOHERENCE stop before GREEN is negative framework evidence, not a verified positive SFT trajectory.

behaviorVerification.reason: The attempted occurredAt RED was BROKEN under a stale selected javaspec binary; GREEN was not attempted and all source/specification changes were reverted.

evaluationEligibility.reason: Not independently approved as an evaluation case.

knownIssues: The project launcher selected a stale javaspec 0.1.0-SNAPSHOT binary without fix 5b65099.
The required meaningful RED was unavailable; selected execution was BROKEN.
No GREEN exists and no numbered episode 0035 was created by design.

replayability.reason: Sealed trace integrity, chronology, binary fingerprint, and clean final Git state were verified; the external build environment was not mutated for an independent execution replay.

sftEligibility.reason: No verified behavior success: stale framework binary caused a BROKEN RED, GREEN was not attempted, and all code/specification edits were reverted.

behaviorVerification.reason: The project launcher failed before baseline; no RED, code/specification change, GREEN, or behavior verification occurred.

evaluationEligibility.reason: Not independently approved as an evaluation case.

knownIssues: Upstream launcher 33fb70a required its repository root POM, but the sealed project wrapper mounted only the launcher script.
The launcher failed on /usr/local/pom.xml before baseline.
No RED or GREEN exists and no numbered episode 0035 was created by design.

replayability.reason: Sealed trace integrity, chronology, historical wrapper fingerprint, exact stderr, and clean final Git state were verified; the repaired wrapper was not reverted for execution replay.

sftEligibility.reason: No training behavior trajectory exists because execution stopped before baseline, RED, edits, GREEN, or behavior verification.

behaviorVerification.reason: The selected occurredAt example never executed because javaspec generated invalid Java; GREEN was not attempted and all attempted production/specification changes were reverted.

evaluationEligibility.reason: Not independently approved as an evaluation case.

knownIssues: Javaspec preserved constructor order and appended java.time.Instant occurredAt but also emitted conflicting pending public Object occurredAt().
Compilation failed before example execution; no meaningful RED result or GREEN exists.
All attempted code/specification changes were reverted; no numbered episode 0035 was created.

replayability.reason: Sealed trace integrity, chronology, framework fingerprint, generated failure, and clean final Git state were verified; independent framework mutation/replay was not performed.

sftEligibility.reason: FRAMEWORK_INCOHERENCE stopped the slice before meaningful RED execution and GREEN; this is negative framework evidence, not verified positive SFT material.

behaviorVerification.reason: Safe generation made the selected occurredAt assertion pass, but the then-effective v4 contract did not admit the pre-generation dry-run as RED; the candidate behavior was reverted and no RED/GREEN completion was accepted.

evaluationEligibility.reason: Workflow-policy incident, not an independently approved evaluation case.

knownIssues: Effective bdd-java-spec-driven-v4 required post-generation assertion RED even though coherent record-component generation completed the approved structural behavior.
All attempted production and specification changes were reverted; no numbered episode 0035 was created.
Later generic contract bdd-java-spec-driven-v5 at source-pack commit e57021f accepts structural RED and prohibits manufactured defects, but does not retroactively make this trace SFT-eligible.

replayability.reason: Sealed trace integrity, chronology, safe-generation result, policy stop, and clean final Git state were verified; independent execution replay was not performed.

sftEligibility.reason: The effective v4 trajectory stopped on a workflow-policy conflict and reverted the candidate behavior; it is not an admitted successful RED/GREEN episode and no training messages view was emitted.

behaviorVerification.reason: Structural RED, selected JavaSpec 1/1, envelope 6/6, full 35/35, Maven 35 tests, zero stubs, exact record shape, and both repository validators verified.

codeQualityStatus.reason: Single bounded semantic slice; exact restoration of disclosed exploratory side effect; diff and shape checks pass.

evaluationEligibility.reason: No independent evaluation-case approval has been performed.

knownIssues: An exploratory launcher run without --generate unexpectedly applied the candidate constructor before failing on stale generated support; it was restored exactly before the canonical constructor probe and explicit safe generation.
The candidate is mechanically and behaviorally validated but lacks independent human approval required for final CURATED_SFT.

The earlier class-major-69 warning came only from an accidental host-side Maven rerun under GraalVM Java 25.0.3 and was non-authoritative. The project targets Java 21, and fresh verification in the official OpenJDK 21.0.11 build container exited 0 with zero Unsupported class file major version warnings. This is not a project Java 21 coverage limitation; no coverage percentage was measured or claimed.

replayability.reason: Sealed trace integrity, complete chronology, patch, Git states, and verification evidence independently validated; no separate clean execution replay was performed.

sftEligibility.reason: RAW_EVENT_STREAM, exactly one JavaSpec behavior, complete provenance, structural RED and GREEN evidence, bounded patch, privacy sanitization, and mechanical validation pass. Final CURATED_SFT requires independent approval.
